market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Solihull's most coveted penthouse, boasting a spacious balcony perfect for sunset views and entertaining friends. This modern sanctuary can accommodate up to 4 guests and features a comfortable living area, stylish kitchen, and 2 bedrooms. Enjoy seamless Wi-Fi and secure parking. As a bonus, the property is pet-friendly, so bring your furry friends along. Located in the heart of Solihull, explore the bustling Market Square and nearby parks. Whether you're a couple or group of friends, this penthouse offers the ultimate getaway experience. With its prime location and luxurious amenities, you'll feel right at home.
top_amenity_gaps: Parking and facilities - a must-have for guests in this market
Outdoor spaces - a balcony with views would be a great differentiator
Entertainment - consider adding a projector or smart TV to elevate the experience
analysis.photo_order_rec: Feature the penthouse's balcony as the cover photo to showcase its stunning views and outdoor space
key_diagnosis: Your 15.2% occupancy rate is significantly lower than the cohort median of 28.3%, costing £2888.16 in lost revenue (£192.2/night x 76 open nights)
Your nightly rate is £17 above the cohort median, a moderate price premium, but the occupancy gap suggests you could adjust your pricing strategy
You have no images listed, which could be hindering bookings - consider adding high-quality photos to showcase your property's best features
analysis.outreach_hook: We've identified a significant occupancy gap in your listings, £2888.16 in lost revenue over 76 open nights, which we think can be addressed with some targeted adjustments
